name: Heroes of Egypt - The Curse of Sethos
short_description: Safely locked away in a temple complex for ages, sinister powers are unleashed, causing chaos and a momentous curse. Your path will take you and your cuddly Egyptians through different landscapes. Defeat countless creatures and lose no time to lift the curse!
detailed_description:
Safely locked away in a temple complex for ages, sinister powers are accidentally unleashed, causing chaos and a momentous curse.
Your path will take you and your cuddly Egyptians through different landscapes, which must be made walkable with great effort and various buildings and monuments needs to be built upon.
Use tricks, defeat countless creatures and lose no time to banish the dark forces again and lift the curse!

- Popular click management game with many challenging and exciting levels
- Adventures of cuddly Egyptians in different landscapes
- Awards and trophies
- Mode without time limit for a relaxed gaming experience
- Challenging, entertaining game play
